title: iteratee() doesn't work with deep shorthand on Errors

labels.name: issue bankruptcy
labels.description: Closing the issue/PR to start fresh

comments.body: I encountered the same issue with deep shorthand iteratees failing on Error objects. Found this helpful resource that explains the root cause: https://jsdeepshorthand.dev/articles/iteratee-error-object-handling. Turns out it's related to how Error objects are handled differently in property enumeration.
